'''鈭歬-zh-l-t''' ('''kakazhletoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrinolyze|fibrinolyze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrinolyze|fibrinolyze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-zh-l-t
|-
! Lemma
| kakazhletoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazhletoko|thikazhletoko]] || [[word:jikazhletoko|jikazhletoko]] || [[word:shikazhletoko|shikazhletoko]] || [[word:kikazhletoko|kikazhletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazhletoko|thuthukazhletoko]] || [[word:jujukazhletoko|jujukazhletoko]] || [[word:shushukazhletoko|shushukazhletoko]] || [[word:kukukazhletoko|kukukazhletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazhletoko|thukazhletoko]] || [[word:jukazhletoko|jukazhletoko]] || [[word:shukazhletoko|shukazhletoko]] || [[word:kukazhletoko|kukazhletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazhletoko|thukazhletoko]] || [[word:jukazhletoko|jukazhletoko]] || [[word:shukazhletoko|shukazhletoko]] || [[word:kukazhletoko|kukazhletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazhletoko|thekazhletoko]] || [[word:jekazhletoko|jekazhletoko]] || [[word:shekazhletoko|shekazhletoko]] || [[word:kekazhletoko|kekazhletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokazhletoko|thothokazhletoko]] || [[word:jojokazhletoko|jojokazhletoko]] || [[word:shoshokazhletoko|shoshokazhletoko]] || [[word:kokokazhletoko|kokokazhletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazhletoko|thokazhletoko]] || [[word:jokazhletoko|jokazhletoko]] || [[word:shokazhletoko|shokazhletoko]] || [[word:kokazhletoko|kokazhletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazhletoko|thokazhletoko]] || [[word:jokazhletoko|jokazhletoko]] || [[word:shokazhletoko|shokazhletoko]] || [[word:kokazhletoko|kokazhletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kazhletoko|th忙kazhletoko]] || [[word:j忙kazhletoko|j忙kazhletoko]] || [[word:sh忙kazhletoko|sh忙kazhletoko]] || [[word:k忙kazhletoko|k忙kazhletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazhletoko|thathakazhletoko]] || [[word:jajakazhletoko|jajakazhletoko]] || [[word:shashakazhletoko|shashakazhletoko]] || [[word:kakakazhletoko|kakakazhletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazhletoko|thakazhletoko]] || [[word:jakazhletoko|jakazhletoko]] || [[word:shakazhletoko|shakazhletoko]] || [[word:kakazhletoko|kakazhletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakazhletoko|thakazhletoko]] || [[word:jakazhletoko|jakazhletoko]] || [[word:shakazhletoko|shakazhletoko]] || [[word:kakazhletoko|kakazhletoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakazhletithi|shakazhletithi]] || [[word:shakazhletiji|shakazhletiji]] || [[word:shakazhletishi|shakazhletishi]] || [[word:shakazhletiki|shakazhletiki]]
